description: WinForge tiered package manifest. IDs follow winget and Scoop conventions; install.ps1 verifies every winget id with `winget show --id <id> --exact` at runtime, so brittle or drifting IDs degrade to a warning rather than a hard failure.
notes: Each entry has: id (winget id, scoop name, or short tag for script/manual), source (winget|scoop|store|manual|script), optional bucket (scoop), optional script (path to a PowerShell action), notes.
Use 'optional: true' for paid, account-gated, region-locked, or sometimes-unavailable apps. install.ps1 downgrades failures to warnings.
Use 'manual: true' for apps with no reliable headless install path; install.ps1 prints instructions instead of failing.
Use 'source: script' for things that aren't packages (e.g. Scoop bootstrap, FancyZones config import, SDKMAN inside WSL, deploying Komorebi via Scoop).
Tier inventories are exact: Core 15, Power-user +20, Dev +23, AI +10. Tiers extend each other via the 'extends' field; install.ps1 walks the chain and dedupes by source:id.

core.label: Core 15 — essentials every Windows 11 box should have

packages.notes: FancyZones, PowerRename, Run, Color Picker, Peek
Files (Files App) — modern multi-tab Explorer alternative
Sub-second filename search across the disk
Fast keystroke launcher; runtime verifies the id
Clipboard manager with history
Best-in-class screenshot and screen-recording tool
Archive utility
Plays everything
Password manager (desktop client)
Modern Windows terminal
PowerShell 7 (pwsh)
Scoop is bootstrapped by install.ps1 via the official web installer (https://get.scoop.sh); it is not a winget package.
Winget-AutoUpdate (WAU) — daily background app updater. Runtime verifies the id.
RoundedTB — taskbar tweaker. Optional: id may not be present in winget; falls back to a manual hint.
Per-app volume mixer for the system tray

power-user.label: Power-user +20 — productivity, window mgmt, system insight, sync

packages.notes: Cross-platform text expander
AutoHotkey v2. If id drifts upstream, runtime verification will warn; alt id: Lexikos.AutoHotkey
Imports configs/powertoys/fancyzones-layouts.json into PowerToys; deploy-configs.ps1 handles this. Requires PowerToys (Core 15).
Komorebi tiling window manager. Optional: id may also be available via Scoop (extras/komorebi); runtime verifies.
Mica For Everyone — applies Mica/Acrylic to legacy windows. Runtime verifies the id.
StartAllBack — paid (~$5). Trial works after install. Marked optional; runtime verifies the id (alt: manual install from startallback.com).

ExplorerPatcher — restores classic Explorer/taskbar UI. No clean winget id; install manually from github.com/valinet/ExplorerPatcher. Carries breakage risk on Windows 11 feature updates — see docs/SAFETY.md.
Process Lasso — CPU/IO priority manager
HWiNFO — deep hardware sensor reporting
Macrium Reflect Free was discontinued. Use Macrium Reflect X (paid) from macrium.com or substitute Veeam Agent Free / Hasleo Backup Suite Free.
Folder comparison & sync
Local-first markdown notes
Notes & wiki
Mosh client (mobile-shell) — Scoop install is the most reliable on Windows; runs in WSL too.
SFTP/SCP/FTP GUI
FileZilla FTP client
Cloud-storage CLI
Continuous peer-to-peer file sync
Streaming media center
Remote desktop

dev.label: Dev +23 — toolchains, IDEs, runtimes, containers, DB GUIs

packages.notes: WSL 2; Ubuntu-24.04 is provisioned by install.ps1
Requires WSL2; commercial-use license check applies
VS Code
Installs every id in vscodeExtensions[] via `code --install-extension`.
Cursor — AI-first VS Code fork. Runtime verifies the id (alt: Cursor.Cursor).
Git for Windows
gh CLI
Gpg4win for commit/email signing
Fast Node Manager — installs Node toolchains on demand
Python package & venv manager
Rust toolchain installer
Go
SDKMAN is Linux/macOS only. configs/wsl/bootstrap-ubuntu.sh installs SDKMAN inside WSL Ubuntu and uses it for Java/Maven/Gradle.
API client
Universal DB GUI
TablePlus — Windows build is paid after trial; runtime verifies the id
Beekeeper Studio — open-source SQL GUI
MongoDB Compass
Postico is macOS-only — no Windows build exists. Use DBeaver, Beekeeper Studio, or TablePlus on Windows.
ngrok tunnels
Cloudflare Tunnel client
Tabby — cross-platform terminal
Warp Terminal for Windows is in active development; if no stable winget id is found, runtime falls back to a manual hint pointing at app.warp.dev/download.

ai.label: AI +10 — local LLMs, AI editors, voice, alternatives

packages.notes: Local LLM runtime; `ollama run llama3.1`
LM Studio — GUI for local models. Runtime verifies the id (alt: LMStudio.LMStudio); falls back to a manual hint if neither resolves.
Jan (jan.ai) — open-source local LLM client. No stable winget id at time of writing; download installer from jan.ai.
ComfyUI portable — install.ps1 will offer to download the latest portable zip from github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/releases and unpack to %USERPROFILE%\AI\ComfyUI. Heavy GPU recommended.
Whispering (github.com/braden-w/whispering) — local-first dictation. Install from the GitHub Releases page; no winget id.
Wispr Flow — voice-to-text. Runtime verifies the id; if missing, falls back to manual install from flowvoice.ai.
Cursor (already in Dev tier — listed here for completeness; resolver dedupes by source:id so it isn't installed twice).
Claude Desktop — runtime verifies the id; not yet GA in winget for all regions.

Raycast has no Windows build. WinForge installs Flow Launcher (already in Core 15) as the canonical Raycast alternative. This entry is documentation only — the resolver will skip it after recording the choice in state.json.

Privacy-preserving Windows Recall alternative. WinForge does NOT auto-install any third-party recall-style timeline tool. Recommended stack (already provided by WinForge): Everything (instant file index) + PowerToys Run + Flow Launcher. Documented in docs/PACKAGES.md; nothing is forced.
